steps.title: Weigh performance and cost
steps.content: The scientist's conclusion depends on practical considerations: BZMA must perform nearly as well as the expensive β-cyclodextrin resin while outperforming other inexpensive methacrylate resins.

steps.title: Find the best-value evidence
steps.content: The finding that BZMA is only modestly lower than the expensive resin but higher than the other cheap resins supports that trade-off across both compounds. Practical potential here depends on strong absorption plus lower cost, not on absorption alone, in wastewater cleanup. B is uneven, while C and D fail to distinguish BZMA from low-cost peers. The answer is A.
